import.dialog.title: Import Data
import.error.noActiveVault: No vault is unlocked. Please unlock a vault before importing data.
import.selectFormat.title: Choose the format of the file you want to import:
import.formatDesc.generic-csv: Import any CSV file with custom column mapping
import.formatDesc.encrypted-json: Import a SecurePass Manager encrypted backup (.spm)
import.success.title: Successfully imported {count} items
import.error.title: Import Failed
export.dialog.title: Export Data
export.selectFormat.title: Choose the format you want to export your data to:
export.format.encrypted-json.label: Encrypted JSON (.spm)
export.format.encrypted-json.description: Secure, encrypted backup using your vault key. Recommended.
export.format.json-plain.label: JSON Plain Text
export.format.json-plain.description: Human-readable JSON. Passwords will be visible in plain text.
export.format.csv.label: CSV Plain Text
export.format.csv.description: Spreadsheet-compatible CSV. Passwords will be visible in plain text.
export.warning.title: Security Warning
export.warning.body: You are about to export your data in plain text. Your passwords and notes will be stored unencrypted in the file. Anyone with access to this file can read your credentials.
export.warning.bodyWithVault: You are about to export data from vault {vaultName} in plain text. Your passwords and notes will be stored unencrypted in the file. Anyone with access to this file can read your credentials.
export.warning.list.share: Do not share this file with anyone.
export.warning.list.delete: Delete the file as soon as you no longer need it.
export.warning.list.encrypted: Consider using Encrypted JSON for safer backups.
export.progress.label: Progress
export.success.title: Export completed successfully
export.error.title: Export Failed
columnMapper.fields.title: Title
columnMapper.instruction: Map your CSV columns to SecurePass fields. Drag or select from the dropdowns below.
columnMapper.error.duplicateColumns: Each CSV column can only be mapped to one SecurePass field.
dropZone.instruction: Drag & drop a CSV, JSON, or XML file to import
validation.emailWarning: This does not look like a valid email address.
validation.urlWarning: This does not look like a valid URL.
validation.whitespaceOnly: This field cannot be empty or contain only whitespace.
validation.invalidCharacters: This field contains invalid characters. Only printable characters are allowed.
validation.folderAlreadyExists: A folder with this name already exists.
validation.folderAlreadyExistsSuggestion: A folder with this name already exists. Suggested: "{suggestion}"
security.lockScreen.memoryWiped: Encryption keys have been securely wiped from memory
security.lock.success: Your keys have been securely wiped from memory. Vault is now locked.
security.lock.title: Vault Locked
security.vaultSwitch.success: Previous vault secured. Keys wiped from memory. New vault is ready.
auth.heading.unlock: Enter your master password to unlock
auth.error.passwordTooShort: Master password must be at least 8 characters
auth.footer.setupInfo: Your master password encrypts all data locally. It cannot be recovered.
auth.footer.unlockInfo: Press Esc to clear the form
export.error.failedSerialize: Failed to process and serialize data.
auth.error.ipcUnavailable: Electron IPC not available. Please restart the application.
auth.error.passwordTooWeak: Master password too weak: {label}. Choose a stronger password.
auth.error.appNotInitialized: App not initialized. Please set up first.
auth.error.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
auth.error.databaseNotOpen: Database is not open. Unlock first.
settings.general.heading: General
settings.security.heading: Security
settings.security.reencryptNote: Changing your master password will re-encrypt your entire database. This may take a moment.
settings.security.flagOutdatedDesc: Passwords not changed within this period will appear in the outdated list on the Health view.
settings.security.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete all items in trash? This cannot be undone.
settings.security.otpPrivacyModeDesc: Blur OTP codes and QR codes by default to prevent accidental exposure during screen sharing.
otp.copyWarning: This code is sensitive. Do not share it with anyone.
otp.blurHint: Hidden for privacy. Click to reveal.
otp.clockDriftWarning: System clock may be out of sync. TOTP codes may not be valid. Ensure OS time synchronization (NTP) is enabled.
otp.offlinePrerequisite: TOTP codes are generated entirely offline. Accurate system time (NTP sync) is required for valid codes.
settings.passwordDefaults.heading: Password Generator Defaults
settings.data.heading: Data Management
settings.data.exportDesc: Download an encrypted copy of your entire database.
settings.data.importDesc: Restore from a previously exported backup file.
settings.data.purgeDesc: Permanently delete all items currently in the trash.
settings.about.heading: About
settings.about.description: SecurePass Manager is a zero-knowledge, local-first password manager. Your master password never leaves your device. All data is encrypted before being written to disk.
health.empty.title: Password Health
health.empty.description: Add some passwords to see your security health report.
health.heading: Password Health
generator.heading: Password Generator
item.error.duplicateTitle: An item with this title already exists in this folder.
item.selectDescription: Choose a password entry from the list to see its details.
item.revealOtpDescription: Click to show your one-time password code
item.deleteItemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? It will be moved to trash.
vault.selector.label: Select Vault
vault.create.dialog.title: Create New Vault
vault.create.dialog.description: Create a new vault with its own master password and encryption key.
vault.create.label.name: Vault Name
vault.create.placeholder.name: e.g. Personal, Work, Family
vault.create.error.nameTooLong: Vault name must be 100 characters or less
vault.import.dialog.title: Import Existing Vault
vault.import.dialog.description: Import an existing vault database file from another SecurePass Manager instance or backup.
vault.import.selectFile: Click to select a database file
vault.import.error.fileRequired: Please select a database file to import
vault.switcher.confirmMessage: You are about to switch from "{currentVault}" to "{targetVault}". Your current vault will be locked and its encryption keys will be wiped from memory.
vault.manage.dialog.title: Manage Vault
vault.manage.rename.title: Rename Vault
vault.manage.delete.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete the vault "{vaultName}" and all its data. This action cannot be undone unless you have a backup or exported copy.
vault.manage.delete.warning: Warning: This action is irreversible. Make sure you have exported or backed up any data you want to keep.
vault.manage.delete.isActiveWarning: This vault is currently active and will be locked before deletion. All encryption keys will be wiped from memory.
vault.manage.delete.keepDatabase: Keep database file (only remove from registry)
vault.manage.backup.description: Create an encrypted backup of this vault. The vault contents are NOT decrypted during this process.
vault.restore.dialog.title: Restore Vault from Backup
vault.restore.dialog.description: Restore a vault from a previously created backup file (.spmv).
vault.restore.selectFile: Click to select a backup file
vault.restore.label.name: Vault Name
vault.restore.error.fileRequired: Please select a backup file to restore
vault.restore.error.nameConflict: A vault with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
vault.error.restoreFailed: Failed to restore vault from backup.
vault.manage.info.title: Vault Information
qrScan.title: Scan OTP QR Code
qrScan.description: Upload, drag & drop, or paste a QR code image to import OTP settings.
qrScan.dropZoneAria: Drop zone for QR code image
qrScan.dropText: Drop image here or click to browse
qrScan.pasteHint: You can also paste an image or otpauth:// URI
qrScan.errorUnknown: An unknown error occurred while scanning.
qrScan.errorNotImage: The dropped file is not a valid image.
qrScan.errorReadFailed: Failed to read the image file.
qrScan.manualDescription: Enter the OTP secret and configuration manually.
qrScan.manual.label: Label
otp.onboarding.title: New Feature: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
otp.onboarding.description: You can now store and generate TOTP codes directly inside SecurePass Manager — no extra authenticator app needed. Add OTP to any item from the item detail view.
otp.onboarding.optional: This feature is optional and has no impact on performance if not used.
